name: EAGLE BANCORP INC
summary: Part I In this report, unless otherwise expressly stated or the context otherwise requires, the terms "we," "us," the "Company," "Eagle" and "our" refer to Eagle Bancorp,Inc. and our subsidiaries on a consolidated basis, except in the description of any of our securities, in which case these terms refer solely to Eagle Bancorp,Inc. and not to any of our subsidiaries. References to "EagleBank" or "Bank" refer to EagleBank, which is our principal operating subsidiary. This report contains addition...
